message:
feat(engine): harden TS classification, regime shift testing, delimiter safety, and support surface contract

TS normalization (ts_normalization.rs):
- Move `interface`, `enum`, and `implements` detection from document-wide
  substring search to line-level statement-start checks, preventing
  false-positive TypeScript classification when these keywords appear
  inside string literals or comments
- Add class_declaration_uses_implements_clause() that parses class
  declarations with proper export/default prefix handling and only looks
  for `implements` between the class keyword and the opening brace
- Add import_type_keyword_uses_type_only_syntax() to distinguish
  `import type, { keep } from "pkg"` (runtime default import of module
  named "type" with named imports) from `import type { Foo } from "pkg"`
  (type-only import to elide)
- Add 8 new tests covering string/comment false positives and the
  `import type, { ... }` pattern

Regime shift detector (regime_shift_detector.rs):
- Add 382 lines of comprehensive test coverage: CUSUM edge cases (zero
  reference, exact threshold, recovery, observation counting, EWMA
  convergence, alarm count), engine auto-adaptation (reference update,
  disabled check), downgrade action classification (critical disables
  adaptive, queue depth triggers reduce concurrency), summary/manifest
  serde roundtrips, MetricKind exhaustive registration and serde,
  tick tracking, config hash, certificate ID format, DowngradeAction
  exhaustive serde

Extension registry (extension_registry.rs):
- Add second_signing_key() test helper and verification helpers for
  publisher key mismatch testing

Regret bounded router (regret_bounded_router.rs):
- Fix potential overflow in Exp3/FTRL regret bound computation: use
  .saturating_mul(2) instead of 2 * expr to prevent panic on large
  values; compute integer_ln_millionths via i128 intermediate to avoid
  overflow when log2 is large (n near u64::MAX)

Support surface contract (support_surface_contract.rs, docs/):
- Add callback stdlib collection callbacks row to the RGC support
  surface contract (Array/Map/Set callback-heavy prototype methods
  that fail-closed on the shipped runtime path)
- Add 2 contract tests verifying the new row's structure and that
  stdlib.rs still installs the expected builtins
- Update expected row count from 12 to 13
- Update RGC_SUPPORT_SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1.md with the new row

Adversarial supremacy synthesis:
- Fix coverage fraction denominator to use actual reachable space
  (max_generations * archetypes * strategies) capped by budget instead
  of raw budget alone

Typed array fast lane:
- Replace % 0 check with .is_multiple_of() per clippy

Array fast lane:
- Avoid clone-after-push by cloning before push to eliminate
  unnecessary borrow-after-move

Other modules (deterministic_sim_scheduler, execution_orchestrator,
flow_envelope, hindsight_escalation_bundle, lowering_gap_inventory,
parser_gap_inventory):
- Minor enrichment updates and test additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
